gable , DebugListener , Derivable , Executable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class LevelListener extends Receiver This actor will output an integer between 0 and 100 whenever

will output an integer between 0 and 100 whenever a specified command with the specified house and unit code is detected. If this actor fires and no such command has been issued, then it outputs -1. Only commands that have levels associated

s -1. Only commands that have levels associated with them are supported, namely DIM and BRIGHT. For on-off commands, use CommandListener . Note also that the CM17A wireless interface is unidirectional, only sending commands to the X10 networ

tional, only sending commands to the X10 network, and not receiving from it. Thus, this actor will not work with it (or more precisely, it will only report commands that are sent out from the same serial port). Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version
